title: Automated probabilistic reconstruction of white-matter pathways in health and disease using an atlas of the underlying anatomy
abstract: TRACULA (TRActs Constrained by UnderLying Anatomy) uses prior anatomical knowledge to reconstruct white-matter pathways from diffusion MRI, enabling automated macro-scale connectome estimation.
notes: Key macro-scale connectomics method. BRAIN CONNECTS PI for primate/human connectomes.
